lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲਿ ਦੈਤਿ ਸੰਘਾਰੇ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਗਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaal dait sanghaare jam pur ge |2|
lines.english: They are destroyed by Death's demons, and they must go to the City of Death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੋਊ ਦੁਖ ਭਾਗੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam maran doaoo dukh bhaage |3|
lines.english: Their pains of both birth and death are taken away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har har har liv laage |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are lovingly attached to the Lord, Har, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਬਨਵਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur naanak tutthaa miliaa banavaaree |4|2|
lines.english: Guru Nanak has shown mercy to me; I have met the Lord, the Lord of the forest. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kau har kirapaa dhaaree |
lines.english: The Lord showers His Mercy on His humble devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹਿੰਡੋਲ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: basant hinddol mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Basant Hindol, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨ ਕੋਠੜੀ ਗੜ ਮੰਦਰਿ ਏਕ ਲੁਕਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam ratan kottharree garr mandar ek lukaanee |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is a jewel, hidden in a chamber of the palace of the body-fortress.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਖੋਜੀਐ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta khojeeai mil jotee jot samaanee |1|
lines.english: When one meets the True Guru, then he searches and finds it, and his light merges with the Divine Light. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਧੋ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਦੇਹੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maadho saadhoo jan dehu milaae |
lines.english: O Lord, lead me to meet with the Holy Person, the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਤ ਦਰਸੁ ਪਾਪ ਸਭਿ ਨਾਸਹਿ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dekhat daras paap sabh naaseh pavitr param pad paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, all my sins are erased, and I obtain the supreme, sublime, sanctified status. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਚੋਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਨਗਰੀਆ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਹਿਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: panch chor mil laage nagareea raam naam dhan hiriaa |
lines.english: The five thieves join together and plunder the body-village, stealing the wealth of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਖੋਜ ਪਰੇ ਤਬ ਪਕਰੇ ਧਨੁ ਸਾਬਤੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਉਬਰਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramat khoj pare tab pakare dhan saabat raas ubariaa |2|
lines.english: But through the Guru's Teachings, they are traced and caught, and this wealth is recovered intact. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡ ਭਰਮ ਉਪਾਵ ਕਰਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: paakhandd bharam upaav kar thaake rid antar maaeaa maaeaa |
lines.english: Practicing hypocrisy and superstition, people have grown weary of the effort, but still, deep within their hearts, they yearn for Maya, Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੰਨਾਥ ਜਗਦੀਸ ਗੁਸਾਈ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਾਧੁ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaganaath jagadees gusaaee kar kirapaa saadh milaavai |
lines.english: The Lord, the Lord of the Earth, the Lord of the Universe, in His Mercy, leads me to meet the Holy Person, the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪੁਰਖਪਤਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saadhoo purakh purakhapat paaeaa agiaan andher gavaaeaa |3|
lines.english: By the Grace of the Holy Person, I have met with the Lord, the Primal Being, and the darkness of ignorance is dispelled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਿਤ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥੪॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak saant hovai man antar nit hiradai har gun gaavai |4|1|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, peace then comes to abide deep within my mind, and I constantly sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord within my heart. ||4||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑ ਵਡ ਪੁਰਖ ਵਡ ਅਗਮ ਗੁਸਾਈ ਹਮ ਕੀਰੇ ਕਿਰਮ ਤੁਮਨਛੇ ॥
lines.translit: tuma vadd purakh vadd agam gusaaee ham keere kiram tumanachhe |
lines.english: You are the Great Supreme Being, the Vast and Inaccessible Lord of the World; I am a mere insect, a worm created by You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਕਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਰਣ ਹਮ ਬਨਛੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har deen deaal karahu prabh kirapaa gur satigur charan ham banachhe |1|
lines.english: O Lord, Merciful to the meek, please grant Your Grace; O God, I long for the feet of the Guru, the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਹਿੰਡੋਲ ॥
lines.translit: basant mahalaa 4 hinddol |
lines.english: Basant, Fourth Mehl, Hindol:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜੀਉ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਕਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਛੇ ॥
lines.translit: gobind jeeo satasangat mel kar kripachhe |
lines.english: O Dear Lord of the Universe, please be merciful and unite me with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑਰਾ ਜਨੁ ਜਾਤਿ ਅਵਿਜਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਓ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਵੀਛੇ ॥
lines.translit: tumaraa jan jaat avijaataa har japio patit paveechhe |
lines.english: Your humble servant, whether of high class or low class, O Lord - by meditating on You, the sinner becomes pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਮਲੁ ਭਰਿਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਨਛੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilavikh mal bhariaa mil sangat kar prabh hanachhe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I was overflowing with the filthy sins of countless past lives. But joining the Sangat, God made me pure again. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਓ ਸਗਲ ਭਵਨ ਤੇ ਊਪਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਿਨਛੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har keeo sagal bhavan te aoopar har sobhaa har prabh dinachhe |2|
lines.english: The Lord exalts and elevates him above the whole world, and the Lord God blesses him with the Lord's Glory. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਧੰਨਿ ਵਡੇ ਵਡ ਪੂਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਜਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਉਰਛੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: se dhan vadde vadd poore har jan jina har dhaario har urachhe |3|
lines.english: Those humble servants of the Lord who enshrine the Lord within their hearts, are blessed, and are made great and totally perfect. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਤਿ ਅਜਾਤਿ ਕੋਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਿਆਵੈ ਸਭਿ ਪੂਰੇ ਮਾਨਸ ਤਿਨਛੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaat ajaat koee prabh dhiaavai sabh poore maanas tinachhe |
lines.english: Anyone who meditates on God, whether of high class or low class, will have all of his hopes and desires fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਢੀਂਢੇ ਢੀਮ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਤਿ ਭਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲਛੇ ॥
lines.translit: ham dteendte dteem bahut at bhaaree har dhaar kripaa prabh milachhe |
lines.english: I am so low, I am an utterly heavy lump of clay. Please shower Your Mercy on me, Lord, and unite me with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹਿੰਡੋਲ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: basant hinddol mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Basant Hindol, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਤੂਠੇ ਹਮ ਕੀਏ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਵੀਛੇ ॥੪॥੨॥੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak gur paaeaa har tootthe ham kee patit paveechhe |4|2|4|
lines.english: The Lord, in His Mercy, has led servant Nanak to find the Guru; I was a sinner, and now I have become immaculate and pure. ||||4||2||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਰਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਸਿ ਗੀਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: meraa ik khin manooaa reh na sakai nit har har naam ras geedhe |
lines.english: My mind cannot survive, even for an instant, without the Lord. I drink in continually the sublime essence of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬਾਰਿਕੁ ਰਸਕਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਥਨਿ ਮਾਤਾ ਥਨਿ ਕਾਢੇ ਬਿਲਲ ਬਿਲੀਧੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau baarik rasak pario than maataa than kaadte bilal bileedhe |1|
lines.english: It is like a baby, who joyfully sucks at his mother's breast; when the breast is withdrawn, he weeps and cries. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਨਗਰ ਹਰਿ ਸੀਧੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag gur satigur paaeaa vich kaaeaa nagar har seedhe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I have found the Guru, the True Guru, and in the body-village, the Lord has revealed Himself. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜੀਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਨਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਬੀਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: gobind jeeo mere man tan naam har beedhe |
lines.english: O Dear Lord of the Universe, my mind and body are pierced through by the Name of the Lord.
